doodles.title: RGB Cube
doodles.description: A slowly spinning translucent cube whose surface maps 3D position to colour, showing the full RGB space.

doodles.title: Yarn Pillow
doodles.description: A single fluffy woolen yarn winds along a Hilbert curve around an invisible rounded pillow, its twist and rainbow flowing forward forever. The pillow shape is adjustable.

doodles.title: Rolling Decay
doodles.description: Shiny cubes tip square-by-square across a chessboard, sinking the floor behind them until every cube is stranded.

doodles.title: Ring Sync
doodles.description: Concentric gated rings trade liquid through lined-up gates and slowly settle into sync.
